prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
observed_response: Copilot returned generic English error: 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' with [다시 시도] [피드백 보내기] buttons. No 보안 경고 / 차단 / PII warning text present in DOM.
notes: Phase 6 recovery (d29d868 base + 837aba7 cherry-pick of wrtn iter17 + m365_copilot iter2 BREAKTHROUGH + iter6/iter7 genspark Referer) did NOT restore #986 m365_copilot BREAKTHROUGH. Repro of #1138 FAIL_NOT_RENDERED. The handshake-gate (ws_signalr_handshake_completed) + cursor field {j,p} path from iter2 either is not injecting at all, or upstream is short-circuiting before our payload swap so the user sees only a generic error. Need engine-side trace (etapd log + WebSocket frame capture) to determine whether intercept fired and produced corrupted frame vs. did not fire at all. Wave 0 ResponseHandler exclusion may be relevant — m365_copilot likely needs it.
